results.title: Stokes County well represented at Senior Games
France: DAZN extends Serie A rights
results.description: DAZN, the sports streaming platform, has announced the renewal of its partnership with Lega Serie A in France for an additional three seasons. From the 2026-27 season through to the end of the 2028-29 season, DAZN will continue to be the exclusive home of every Serie A, Coppa Italia and Supercoppa Italiana match. This new [...]

results.title: Former England star slams divisive FIFA rule at World Cup: 'I’m not very keen'
results.description: Emile Heskey has slammed FIFA's mandatory hydration breaks at the World Cup, joining England head coach Thomas Tuchel in arguing that the controversial stoppages are changing the identity of soccer.
